message:
fix: scope doc correction, buffer waker drop, fabric test adjustments

Assorted small fixes across four files:

- cx/scope.rs: corrected the borrowing row in the spawn_local doc table
  from "Can capture &T (same-thread)" to "Requires 'static (no local &T)"
  to match the actual Send/'static bounds of the spawned future.

- service/buffer.rs: added an explicit `drop(state)` before returning
  Poll::Pending in the mock service's poll_ready, ensuring the
  MutexGuard is released before the waker might be invoked on the same
  thread.  Also sorted import order (Arc before AtomicUsize).

- fabric_lab_integration.rs: reformatted a chained method call for
  rustfmt compliance (clone_from on a separate line).

- fabric_replay_scenarios.rs: updated export_replication_transfer call
  to pass the new explicit Time parameter (Time::from_secs(1)),
  aligning with the snapshot-time propagation fix in the distributed
  module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -668,7 +668,7 @@ fn schedule_replication_reorder(
                     .add_task(TaskId::new_for_test(71, 0))
                     .expect("source task");
                 let transfer = federation
-                    .export_replication_transfer(&mut source)
+                    .export_replication_transfer(&mut source, Time::from_secs(1))
                     .expect("export transfer");
                 let catch_up = federation
                     .plan_replication_catch_up(transfer.sequence, 0)
